triage_rows.direction: use the leaderboard to see whether current incumbent strength is still first, tied, or trailing without reopening challenger surfaces one by one.
combine leaderboard rank with challenger review attention so a single noisy challenger does not silently become the narrative anchor.
only promote a challenger when it both climbs the leaderboard and clears the separate review threshold.

interpretation: The leaderboard adds competition context around the incumbent instead of reducing the system to a single challenger-only view.
It is useful when several themes are near each other and the top challenger alone is not enough to judge focus stability.
